title: rubus × necopinus
intro: Rubus × necopinus is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family, resulting from the cross between Rubus occidentalis and Rubus fruticosus. The medicinal properties of Rubus × necopinus lie in its anthocyanin content, which gives it antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits associated with Rubus × necopinus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against certain diseases due to its high antioxidant capacity. Rubus × necopinus is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
